title: SoundHound AI Stock Gains 3.5% on Revenue Beat and Better-Than-Expected Guidance
text: SoundHound AI's third-quarter results exceeded Wall Street expectations on both revenue and guidance metrics. The company reported Q3 revenue of $13.3 million, representing 19% year-over-year growth and surpassing analyst consensus of $12.8 million. The earnings-per-share metric of -$0.09 matched analyst expectations precisely. Operating losses improved substantially, narrowing 46% compared to the prior year period. The company significantly expanded its enterprise footprint through partnerships with major brands including Krispy Kreme and Jersey Mike's for voice-ordering solutions. A pilot deployment with DS Automobiles marked the first European auto brand integration featuring generative AI capabilities in voice assistance technology. The cumulative bookings backlog reached $341.7 million—a remarkable figure relative to quarterly revenue—signaling substantial future revenue potential. Management projected Q4 revenue between $16-$20 million (midpoint of $18 million), slightly exceeding the Street's $17.6 million projection. The company reaffirmed expectations for positive adjusted EBITDA in the fourth quarter, demonstrating continued progress toward profitability.
